title: UPI (India)
description: Send via any UPI app (PhonePe / GPay / Paytm) to the ID below. Add reference: NOTHING ARCHIVE.

title: Ko-fi
description: One-tap tip via Ko-fi (card / Apple Pay / Google Pay).

title: PayPal
description: Send via PayPal.me — 'Friends & Family' if possible.

title: Boosty (Russia)
description: Support the archive via Boosty (available for cards in Russia).
